title: Cherry Blossom (Sakura) Tools for Advanced Netherite
description:
Texture pack for Advanced Netherite mod based on the Cherry Blossom (Sakura) Tools texture pack by 
Wender
body:
︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵


![Netherite-Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af4e9e7013c7856a5058843d175a539a495d028.png)

A texture pack for Advanced Netherite mod based on Wender's [Cherry Blossom(Sakura) Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cherryblossomsakuratools).

This is for all sakura/cherry blossom enjoyers like me ♡⸜(˶' ꒳ '˶)⸝♡

Thank you, Wender, for the permission to upload this.


︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵

Hello! |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ

Just posting an update regarding this texture pack. I have now changed their in game name and color to match Wender's Cherry Blossom(Sakura) Tools in game name. They will now be called Sakura-Iron, Sakura-Gold, Sakura-Emerald, and Sakura-Diamond. They are still for Advanced Netherite, they just have a different in game name. 

That's all, I hope you are enjoying this little project of mine. ヾ(＾∇＾)

P.S. I might try doing a texture pack for the Netherite Ingot and Blocks, we'll see. ♡(˃͈ ˂͈ )

︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵

**Please support the original texture pack by Wender, too. ♡**
